  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The section constructs a layered argument (gap → method → evidence → contribution claim); logical consistency between premises, experimental comparisons, and conclusions needs checking.",
    "R1.3": "Specific quantitative results (ECE 0.043 vs 0.18/0.22; selective accuracy 91.2% vs 78.3%) are marshaled to support superiority claims; evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing.",
    "R1.4": "The phrase 'first principled treatment of synthesis-time uncertainty in program induction' is a strong novelty claim; assessing it against nearest prior work is central to the section's credibility.",
    "R1.6": "The open-ended phrasing 'help me with this section' frequently signals writing-level assistance; sentence and paragraph quality is plausibly a primary target."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Are you looking primarily for writing-level improvements (clarity, flow, sentence quality), rather than substantive review of the technical claims, evidence strength, and novelty assessment?"
}

rationale.R1.2: The section constructs a layered argument (gap → method → evidence → contribution claim); logical consistency between premises, experimental comparisons, and conclusions needs checking.
rationale.R1.3: Specific quantitative results (ECE 0.043 vs 0.18/0.22; selective accuracy 91.2% vs 78.3%) are marshaled to support superiority claims; evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.4: The phrase 'first principled treatment of synthesis-time uncertainty in program induction' is a strong novelty claim; assessing it against nearest prior work is central to the section's credibility.
rationale.R1.6: The open-ended phrasing 'help me with this section' frequently signals writing-level assistance; sentence and paragraph quality is plausibly a primary target.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you looking primarily for writing-level improvements (clarity, flow, sentence quality), rather than substantive review of the technical claims, evidence strength, and novelty assessment?
